message:
fix: resolve lint issues in hook migration planner

Rename hookMarkerBeginToken/EndToken to hookMarkerBeginTag/EndTag to
avoid gosec G101 false positive. Remove unused requestedDryRun parameter
from formatHookMigrationPlan.
